heading: Today
text: Mostly cloudy, with some sun in southern valleys.  More clouds in the north and mountains, with morning snow showers, more frequent over the higher terrain, tapering off this afternoon.  Blustery and colder.  Highs in the 30s to near 40 north, in the 40s south. Winds northwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting 25 to 35 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Partial clearing in the evening, then more clouds with scattered snow showers.  Cold.  Lows in the 20s, a few upper teens over the higher terrain north.  Winds becoming northwest 10 to 15 mph, diminishing to light by morning.

heading: Tuesday
text: Morning clouds and localized snow showers.  A dusting to an inch, mainly over the higher terrain.  Breaks of sun developing west to east in the afternoon.  Cold.  Highs from 30 to 40 north to south.  Northwest winds near 10 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
